system_core.qcai-launch: Master Orchestrator: Starts Monitor, Viz, and Bridge.
system_core.qcai-stop: Emergency Brake: Safely kills all QCAI processes.
system_core.qcai-refresh-links: Linker: Synchronizes AI tools to the Bazzite Host.

qtool-trigger-pulse.description: Pauses system for full-scope collaborative compression and logic refinement.

qtool-sync-knowledge.description: Forces a full-system DNA synchronization, updates anchor knowledge, and verifies sovereign integrity.

qtool-ghost-check.description: Performs a deep diagnostic of environment secrets, permissions, and storage.

qtool-browser-os.description: Engages the Sovereign Browser Engine to fetch, analyze, and navigate real-time web data.

qtool-monitor-pulse.description: Streams real-time debug logs and high-value truth insights to the console.

qtool-birth-agent.description: Birts a new specialist agent with personality and logic files.

qtool-snapshot.description: Creates a restorable backup of system DNA before risky operations.

qtool-set-limits.description: Restricts swarm resource consumption to prevent system hang.

qtool-broadcast.description: Sends a high-priority message to all swarm members and channels.

qtool-entropy-check.description: Checks if the workspace needs immediate compression or cleaning.

qtool-queue-inject.description: Allows an agent to prioritize a maintenance task.

qtool-forge-link.description: Promotes any script to a global sovereign command.

qtool-re-wire.description: Allows the swarm to re-configure its own Flow Orchestrator paths.
